text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And with that, let the Umadol Concert<n>Meeting
begin! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wait, what... How did I get caught up in<n>this?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
On today's agenda is... discussing<n>interactive
performances for the fans!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
After all, the best part of concerts is<n>when you
feel a strong connection with<n>everyone there. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching memory for activities involving<n>strong
connections... Match found. How<n>about forming a
human pyramid?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think that's what we're talking<n>about... It's
a little too acrobatic.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we're Umadols, not the circus.<n>Maybe we
could have the audience clap<n>along or have them
sing the chorus!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Then why don't we have the<n>audience
clap, and we could perform<n>backflips and
somersaults in time with<n>their claps?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, why don't we move away from<n>acrobatics...
